text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Yeah! Three! Two! One! Yes!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yaaaaah! This is why concert DVDs<n>are the
absolute best!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Mm! Mmm! Glorious... Heavenly...<n>Watching it is
like reliving the concert<n>all over...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wait! What time is it?! I gotta go soon<n>or I'm
gonna be late!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, buut... right after this part is<n>when they...

text_block_list.name: DVD Audio
text_block_list.text:
Thank youuu! There's so much<n>energy here
tonight! The next song is<n>a bit of a tearjerker. You
know the<n>one! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ooohoohoo! Even the setlist is divine!<n>Every single
aspect is just pure<n>heaven!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Just this song! I'll go right after this<n>song!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but the singer right after this is<n>super
awesome... Kehehe, fwaha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Digital gets so caught<n>up in her
DVD that she forgets to go<n>to training.
